title: A difficult decision
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: This term, I had to choose which optional subject to study next year. I was interested (27) both art and computer science, so the decision was not easy. My art teacher said I should choose the subject I enjoyed most, while my parents advised me to think carefully (28) my future plans. I spoke to some older students who had already taken the courses, and their advice was very useful. Art sounded more creative, but computer science seemed better (29) learning practical skills. In the end, I chose computer science because I wanted to understand how apps and websites are made. I still plan to continue drawing (30) the evenings. Although the decision was difficult, I feel satisfied (31) my choice. I know I can change subjects later (32) I realise it is not right for me.
